title: TeraWulf Inc (WULF) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Strategic Moves and Financial Challenges
text: TeraWulf achieved several strategic wins in Q3 2024, including selling its 25% stake in the Nautilus Crypto mine joint venture for $92 million, achieving a 3.4 times return on investment. The company also secured a new long-term ground lease at Lake Mariner, increasing total acreage by nearly 50%. Financially, the company successfully raised $500 million through an oversubscribed convertible bond offering and implemented a $200 million stock buyback program, repurchasing $115 million in shares. Despite strategic gains, TeraWulf faced operational headwinds. GAAP revenues declined significantly, dropping from $35.6 million in Q2 to $27.1 million in Q3 2024. The company reported a GAAP net loss attributable to common shareholders of $23.0 million for the third quarter. Bitcoin production decreased 21% quarter-over-quarter to 555 Bitcoin in Q3, while energy costs per Bitcoin increased significantly from $22,954 in Q2 2024 to $30,448 in Q3 2024. Management expects to complete two new mining buildings by mid-2025 and anticipate one or two customers for the 72.5 megawatts, with announcements expected before year-end.
